welcomeMessage: Welcome to Calvary Chapel Antelope Valley! We are glad you are here. Whether you are joining us in person or online, may God bless you today.

announcements.title: Men's Bible Study
announcements.body: Join us every Tuesday at 7:00 PM in Room 201 for our ongoing men's Bible study through the book of James.

announcements.title: Women's Prayer Breakfast
announcements.body: Ladies, don't miss our monthly prayer breakfast this Saturday at 8:30 AM in the fellowship hall. Please RSVP to the church office.

announcements.title: Youth Night
announcements.body: Teens grades 6–12 are invited to Youth Night this Friday at 6:30 PM. Games, worship, and the Word!

savetheDates.title: Community Outreach Day
savetheDates.description: Serve alongside your church family as we bless our community.

savetheDates.title: Marriage Enrichment Seminar
savetheDates.description: A two-evening seminar for couples at all stages of marriage. Registration required.
